creator: tgyurci@gmail.com
text:
I don't accept this upgrade because the new version doesn't work properly.
I will contact the program's author.

On Tue, Jan 23, 2007 at 02:43:45PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/fusefs-wdfs,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/108258 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/108258
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
